tokens: Apollo 17 Flight Journal - Index PageThe Apollo 17 Flight JournalDavid Woods and Ben FeistWelcome to this 13 April 2026 release of theApollo 17 Flight Journal, part of theApollo Flight Journalseries.Like its companion, theApollo Lunar Surface Journal, it is intended to be a resource for all those interested in the Apollo program, whether in a passing or scholarly capacity.This journal is a collaboration with Ben Feist as a parallel project to his interactive website,Apollo17.org, which covers the entire flight of Apollo 17 from launch to splashdown in an interactive audio-visual manner.

As aliving document, the A17FJ will continue to grow and evolve.Journals for other Apollo flights are available at theAFJ Portal.Travelling from the Earth to the MoonDay 1: The LaunchDay 1: Earth Orbit and Translunar InjectionDay 1: Transposition, Docking and ExtractionDay 1: "A regular human weather satellite"Day 2: Part 1Day 2: Part 2, EarthwatchingDay 3, part 1: Midcourse correction 2Day 3, part 2: E...
